{{Infobox character
| name = General Jarelys Teach
| introduced = Of Darkness and Dawn
}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[General Jarelys Teach]] is an enemy [[Guild Head]] with great power on the [[island]].}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
